scripts.dev: npm run backend & npm run frontend
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,app "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "wait-on -t 120000 http://127.0.0.1:4100/api/health http://127.0.0.1:5176 && npm run electron"
scripts.electron:dist: npm run build --prefix frontend && concurrently -k -n api,app "npm run backend" "wait-on -t 120000 http://127.0.0.1:4100/api/health && CLINICA_ELECTRON_USE_DIST=1 npm run electron"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.backend:publish:win: dotnet publish backend/Clinica.Api/Clinica.Api.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true /p:PublishReadyToRun=true -o release/api-win
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run backend:publish:win && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:package:win: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run backend:publish:win && electron-builder --win --dir --config electron-builder.yml && node scripts/zip-windows-prueba.cjs
scripts.electron:portable:win: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run backend:publish:win && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable --config electron-builder.yml
